original_statement: "Thomas Tuchel's side reached the final in nearly a fifth of the Opta supercomputer's pre-tournament simulations (19.0%), going on to win it 11.2% of the time."
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - England reach final probability
statement_context: Excerpt from Opta England route analysis published by The Analyst on 2026-06-04. Uses 25,000 simulations.
resolution_criteria: England appears in the official FIFA World Cup Final on 2026-07-19.
source_text_snippet: Thomas Tuchel's side reached the final in nearly a fifth of the Opta supercomputer's pre-tournament simulations (19.0%), going on to win it 11.2% of the time.
